title: CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER - 211info
text: EUGENE CHILD DEVELOPMENT AND REHABILITATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF OHSU Child Development and Rehabilitation Center provides a full range of clinical services for children with developmental disabilities or other special health care needs. Specialists and clinical services are available in child development, feeding and swallowing disorders, pediatric psychology, and communication disorders including speech therapy. Specialized pediatric diagnostic and treatment services for brain anomalies and spina bifida. Additional treatment may be available through OHSU outreach clinics. 74B Centennial Loop Suite 100 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Children up to age 21. Up to the age of 24 for Transition Clinic. Call for detailed eligibility criteria. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 346-1640 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main (541) 346-1640 Eugene office (541) 346-3575 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or eligibility . Physician referral required. FEES: Accepts OHP (Open Card or prior authorization through a referral from a primary care provider), private insurance, and Medicare. Financial assistance may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Behavioral Learning Therapy * Adolescents Behavioral Learning Therapy * Children Pediatric Feeding Disorders Programs Pediatrics * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Specialized Pediatric Evaluation Speech Therapy If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE
